Mobile IV service New York Florida

IV Drip. At your door. In 60 minutes.

A certified physician arrives with professional equipment. No waiting rooms, no clinics.

Download the app

Three steps to feeling better

1

Download the app

Available on App Store and Google Play.
Sign up in under a minute

2

Choose your drip

Pick the right formula for your goals
— from recovery to immune support

3

Dedicated person

A certified specialist arrives
at your home, office, or hotel.

Safety first

Certified physicians

Only licensed medical professionals with valid certifications

Arrival within 60 min

Available 24/7 around your area

100% confidential

Your personal data and procedure history are fully protected

Registered formulas

All formulas are registered and FDA-compliant
